name: @nysds/components
description: New York State's design system and code component library.

scripts.build:packages: npm run tsc:packages && turbo run build --filter='./packages/*' --log-order=grouped
scripts.build:root: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build:umd
scripts.build:all: npm run clean:dist && npm run lint && npm run lit-analyze || true && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build:packages && npm run build:root && npm run cem && npm run build:mcp
scripts.build:link: npm run build:all && npm link && cd packages/styles && npm link
scripts.release: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build:all && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run test && npm run cem && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm publish --workspaces --access public && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm publish --access public
scripts.release:dry-run: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build:all && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run test && npm run cem && node src/scripts/publish-dry-run.js
scripts.release:alpha: npm run build && npm run build:umd && npm publish --tag next
scripts.test:build: npm run build:all && npm run test
scripts.storybook:build:all: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build:all && npm run storybook
scripts.clean:node: rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf packages/*/node_modules && rm -rf packages/**/*/node_modules
scripts.clean:dist: rm -rf storybook-static && rm -rf coverage && rm -rf packages/*/coverage && rm -rf dist && find packages -type d -name dist ! -path '*/mcp-server/dist' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean:dist && npm run clean:node && find packages -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -delete 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.cem: npx cem analyze --config ./custom-elements-manifest.config.mjs && cp ./custom-elements.json dist/ && node src/scripts/patch-react-utils.js

author: NYS Design System Team
